acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The three legacy M0 completion reports use full commit SHAs.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The changed completion reports contain the requested full SHA replacements in commits[].

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects non-empty commits[] entries that are not 40-character lowercase hex SHAs.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh uses the existing expect_jq pattern with test("^[0-9a-f]{40}$") for each commits[] string; the command log records a failing short-SHA smoke test.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd reports pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-commit-sha-contract/commands.log records qd report checks passing after the legacy report normalization.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records qd report checking and shared check passing.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-commit-sha-contract/commands.log records bash scripts/qd-reports-check.sh, nix develop -c just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, and git diff --check.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false and status is not_required for this repository-only checker change.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd completion-report metadata validation only; Linux validation passed and macOS validation is not required.
